body.docName: 单据自定义附件字段附件绑定
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/accessory/custom-field/bind 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/accessory/custom-field/bind 
 ## 接口描述 
支持附件绑定至单据附件自定义字段，只支持追加附件至附件自定义字段，不支持更新或删除 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024022903021009","desc":"%20%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E3%80%81%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E9%83%BD%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"fileInfos","required":true,"label":"%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldNumber","required":true,"label":"%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"ACCESSORIES_104631417","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"fileIds","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9%22%2C%22c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f47517%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA100%EF%BC%8C%0A%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E4%B8%BA%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84fileId","maxLength":"100"},"children":[]}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "billId": 2024022202607003,
    "fileInfos": [
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ACCESSORIES_105702744",
            "fileIds": [
                "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9",
                "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f47517"
            ]
        }
    ]
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage":null
} 
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | 200| 成功|

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/accessory/custom-field/bind

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/accessory/custom-field/bind

接口描述

支持附件绑定至单据附件自定义字段，只支持追加附件至附件自定义字段，不支持更新或删除

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024022903021009","desc":"%20%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E3%80%81%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E9%83%BD%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"fileInfos","required":true,"label":"%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldNumber","required":true,"label":"%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"ACCESSORIES_104631417","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"fileIds","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9%22%2C%22c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f47517%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA100%EF%BC%8C%0A%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E4%B8%BA%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84fileId","maxLength":"100"},"children":[]}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
    "billId": 2024022202607003,
    "fileInfos": [
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ACCESSORIES_105702744",
            "fileIds": [
                "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9",
                "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f47517"
            ]
        }
    ]
}

响应报文

{
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage":null
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
200 成功
